codeReview.summary: The current implementation satisfies the reviewed feature contract: bootstrap pending/error states keep the app usable while withholding ownership-sensitive controls, non-user windows no longer mount the interactive shell or titlebar portals, and the remaining active-window command hotspot now resolves against the caller-owned WebviewWindow instead of the literal main handle.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker reported skipping desktop multi-window verification as a procedure deviation, but the mission AGENTS and the skill both already allow code-and-validator evidence when desktop validation is explicitly deferred. The skill wording still made the worker record this as a deviation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md says desktop unsafe validation is deferred/manual; .factory/skills/window-controls-worker/SKILL.md step 8 says to complete strongest code-and-validator evidence when deferred; handoff skillFeedback for worker session 481d3dbc-0268-4135-883b-d7f2eaa375fd still marks step 8 as a deviation.

summary: Reviewed the rerun for bootstrap-shell-gating-hardening from current implementation state only. Diff, handoff, transcript skeleton, and relevant code paths all support a pass for VAL-CONTROLS-004, VAL-CONTROLS-005, and VAL-CONTROLS-008.
